title: Business Analyst
metaDescription: Business Analyst role in Singapore: gather requirements, document processes, and support technology and process improvements.
description: Join our rapidly expanding team. We are looking for an experienced Business Analyst to join our team in Singapore.
duties: Gather, analyse, and document business and system requirements.
Translate stakeholder needs into functional specifications and process flows.
Support the implementation and testing of process and technology improvements.
Prepare reports, dashboards, and insights to support decision-making.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to deliver projects on time.
requirements: Degree in Business, Information Systems, Finance, or a related field.
Strong analytical, documentation, and stakeholder management skills.
Proficiency in data analysis and reporting tools.
remuneration: Remuneration will be commensurate with qualifications and experience.
